title: ToolExecute
description: Method `tool/execute` (host → ext, request). Runs a tool the extension registered at handshake. While it runs the extension may stream `tool/update` notifications keyed by the same `call_id`, and the host may cancel it with `$/cancel`. The result mirrors the engine's ToolResult: LLM-facing `content`, an `is_error` flag, and optional structured `details` for UI rendering.

call_id.description: Correlates this execution with its `tool/update` progress notifications and any `$/cancel`.

arguments.description: Tool arguments, validated by the tool's registered `parameters` schema.

content.description: Text result for the LLM to reason about.

is_error.description: True if the tool failed; the host surfaces it as an error tool-result.

details.description: Optional structured data for UI rendering (diffs, tables, …).
